---
title: 'My AI Avatar?'
date: '2023-12-10T08:49:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: false
categories:
  - 'Avatars'
---

What AI thinks my author headshot should be:<div><br /></div><div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/a/AVvXsEiMnHcFGgNoNwS9ZIjkhnXN-vl1u-RzU1UbHyIl93dIZBP00SHQ-m_RSpvQakkz5YMQS9Q7wKal3vXe23Vgd7WcQ4fCK-D3Btu8ehR9jFA5tomvuNf_YeU9ac0j3TeDdKub5inHAguIUgdPxwM5-rOIbL01-ipEr9gGG-j3mWu87Hx2Mcbgkp1XL9UwiwY" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img alt="" data-original-height="1024" data-original-width="1024" height="240" src="https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/a/AVvXsEiMnHcFGgNoNwS9ZIjkhnXN-vl1u-RzU1UbHyIl93dIZBP00SHQ-m_RSpvQakkz5YMQS9Q7wKal3vXe23Vgd7WcQ4fCK-D3Btu8ehR9jFA5tomvuNf_YeU9ac0j3TeDdKub5inHAguIUgdPxwM5-rOIbL01-ipEr9gGG-j3mWu87Hx2Mcbgkp1XL9UwiwY" width="240" /></a></div>
